name: Exotic Treats
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease a shallow 11-inch x 7-inch baking pan with butter; line the bottom with parchment or waxed paper.
2. Coarsely grind the fruit and nut mix in a food processor or blender.
3. Melt chocolate and butter together in a small bowl placed over a pan of gently simmering water, stirring frequently.
4. Mix in the processed nut mix and half of the orange zest.
5. Spread the mixture smoothly in the prepared pan.
6. Sprinkle the remaining zest over the top, pressing it in lightly.
7. Refrigerate 1 to 2 hours or until firmly set.
8. Loosen the set mixture from the pan by carefully running the tip of a knife around the inside edges of the pan.
9. Carefully turn out onto a board; remove the paper.
10. Turn the mixture over and cut into 32 pieces.
11. Store in an airtight container in a cool place for 2 to 3 days.
